summary: Implemented 9 auxiliary repositories (Feeling, ExerciseFeeling, PersonalRecord, BodyMeasurement, OtherSportRecord, SportType, SportMetric, SportMetricValue, UserSettings) with full CRUD and domain-specific queries. All follow the existing repository pattern with createBaseRepository factory. UserSettings uses get/setValue upsert pattern.
keyDecisions: All repos use createBaseRepository factory pattern consistent with existing repos
UserSettings.setValue uses upsert: findByKey -> exists ? update : create, with auto-generated biz_key from Date.now() * 1000 + counter
PersonalRecord.findMaxByExercise uses ORDER BY pr_value DESC LIMIT 1 for max value query
SportType.findAllIncludingCustom orders by is_custom ASC then sport_name ASC (built-in first, alphabetical within groups)

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: exercise-feeling.repo.ts implements CRUD with findByFeelingBizKey, findByWorkoutExerciseBizKey
personal-record.repo.ts implements CRUD with findByExerciseBizKey, findByType (weight/volume), findMaxByExercise
body-measurement.repo.ts implements CRUD with findByDateRange, findLatest
other-sport.repo.ts implements CRUD with findByDate, findBySportTypeBizKey
user-settings.repo.ts implements get/setValue pattern (upsert by setting_key)
Integration tests with in-memory SQLite pass for all CRUD operations

notes: 82 new tests covering all 9 repositories plus a cross-entity integration test for the other-sport entity chain (SportType -> SportMetric -> OtherSportRecord -> SportMetricValue). Total test suite: 230 tests, 93.38% coverage.
